variants: Baran Ersoy is a notable inventor and shipwright known for his work at Knotwise Shipwrights. He was born in Vermilion Green, where he cultivated his interest in shipbuilding from a young age. Now a resident of Cricketwillow Town, Baran has developed the revolutionary Dawnstone Indexer, a tool aiding in ship design efficiency. His exceptional contributions to the field have earned him the prestigious Riverstone Seal, reflecting his commitment to the craft. Through his continued dedication, Baran is shaping the future of maritime engineering.

Baran's outstanding work has led him to receive the esteemed Riverstone Seal, highlighting his achievements in the craft. His ongoing innovations continue to impact the shipwright community positively.
